texto: Existing is going through the motions of life with no zeal and feeling you have no control
autor: living means embracing all that this large world has to offer and not being afraid to take chances. The beauty of living is knowing you can always start over and there's always a chance for something better.
explicacao: Citação de living means embracing all that this large world has to offer and not being afraid to take chances. The beauty of living is knowing you can always start over and there's always a chance for something better. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Existing is going through the motions of life with no zeal and feeling you have no control” articula reflexao, j-son-m-lee, existing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
